description:
This quiz evaluates proficiency in Regular Expressions, ranging from fundamental string matching to advanced look-around assertions. It presents an intermediate-level challenge with an encouraging and energetic tone designed to motivate learners to master complex patterns.
Topics: Regular Expressions, Quantifiers, Groups, Look-around assertions, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers and students looking to strengthen their string manipulation and pattern matching skills.
